hero.subheadline: Shahaadada halal ma aha oo kaliya calaamad diimeed — waxay tahay calaamad tayo, nadiifnimo iyo wax soo saarka anshaxa ah ee aqoonsiga adduunka. Fur ganacsigaaga suuqa halal adduunka ee $3 trillion.

footer.newsletter: Ku soo deg horumarinta suuqa halal
footer.noSpam: Xog xun ma jirto. Macluumaadka suuqa oo keliya.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Dar Al Halal Certification. Xuquuqda oo dhammi way dhawrantahay.
footer.proudly: Naijeerigaan iyo Xoogga. Caalamka lagu aqoonsaday.
